description: End-of-day back-office dissemination from central broker admin to member firms via fixed-width card code records (accounts, balances, deals, scrip, GL, SLB, elective events)

actors.name: Participating Broker
actors.description: Equity member firm that schedules and consumes dissemination data

actors.name: Service Provider
actors.description: Third party authorized by broker to receive disseminated data

actors.name: Broker User
actors.description: Firm user who schedules downloads via online request process function

scheduling: MUST: Allow broker users to schedule dissemination via online request process function
MUST: Support multiple scheduled requests per day per broker
MUST: Allow filtering by branch code, partner code, portfolio indicator, and FATCA flags
MUST: Support download of full daily data set or changes-only (delta) mode depending on data type
grouping: MUST: Group related data into distinct Card Codes to isolate business domains
MUST: Allocate General Ledger data to separate dataset from other disseminated data
MUST: Allow end users to select which card codes to download per dataset
format: MUST: Use fixed-width card code record format, 173 characters per record, blank filled
MUST: Start every dissemination file with Header record (Card Code 000)
MUST: End every dissemination file with Trailer record (Card Code 999)
MUST: Include layout version number in each record
MUST: Multiply balance amounts by 100 and represent as whole numbers with leading sign (+, -, space)
access_control: MUST: Verify user has relevant access before scheduling dissemination
MUST: Allow dissemination to member firms and authorized service providers
frozen_file: MUST: Support frozen elective event file download via online request process
MUST: Require email address setup before frozen file access
MUST: Provide Header (000), Event Detail (071), Account Detail (072), and Trailer (999) records in frozen file
zero_balance_exclusion: MUST: Support excluding zero balances for card codes 90 and 91 when requested
MUST: Support excluding zero GL balances for card code 75 when requested

errors.message: User does not have access to schedule dissemination
Requested dataset is not available or not configured
Elective event frozen file not available for requested date

schedule_dissemination_request.description: Broker user schedules a dissemination request via online function

schedule_dissemination.description: Persist dissemination run parameters per broker including layout selection flags

generate_eod_dissemination_file.description: EOD batch generates dissemination file per scheduled request

generate_header_record.description: Write Header record (Card Code 000) as the first record of every dissemination file with machine date, machine time, and batch run date

generate_trailer_record.description: Write Trailer record (Card Code 999) as the last record with total record count and batch run date

full_vs_updates_only.description: User selects full dataset download or only records changed on the day, per card code family

download_full_vs_changes.description: User selects full download or changes-only based on data type

exclude_zero_balances.description: When exclusion flag is set, omit zero-balance records from balance layouts (90, 91, 75)

download_elective_frozen_file.description: User downloads frozen elective events file via online request process

scheduling_access_denied.description: User without access attempts to schedule dissemination

file_generation_failure.description: File generation failed during EOD batch or online request

goals.description: End-of-day back-office dissemination from central broker admin to member firms via fixed-width card code records

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details

card_code_map.067: Electronically Settled Corporate Actions Tax Information Record

branch_partner_codes.description: Broker branch or partner code filter; blank = all branches and main office

pf_ind.description: Portfolio indicator filter; use hyphen to force blank when also populating FATCA

fupd.description: Download only updated FATCA records (FATCA must also be N)

ac7.description: Include new and updated Layout 70 (BEMNT) records

up.description: Accounts changed flag — NNNNNNYY pattern for updates-only across 80/85/86/77/78/98

dea.description: Download accounts deactivated on the day (Layout 80)

nz1.description: Exclude zero balances for layouts 90 and 91

nz2.description: Exclude zero GL balances for layout 75

free.description: Include DF, DP and DU transaction codes

r_msts.description: Rights processes newer than 20 business days (Layout 94)

layout_51.description: Account Address Maintenance Record 2 (Physical post / extra contact)

layout_55.description: Legal and Tax Maintenance Record 2 (FATCA / CRS)

layout_56.description: Legal and Tax Maintenance Record 3 (Foreign TINs)

layout_57.description: Legal and Tax Maintenance Record 4 (FICA / Risk)

layout_47.description: Supplementary Names and Address Record 4 (Controlling Persons)

layout_67.description: Electronically Settled Corporate Actions Tax Information Record

layout_000_frozen.description: Elective Events Frozen File Header (Card Code 000)

layout_071.description: Elective Events Frozen File Event Detail Record

layout_072.description: Elective Events Frozen File Account Detail Record

layout_999_frozen.description: Elective Events Frozen File Trailer (Card Code 999)

data_use_cases: Import client holdings and cash balances into trading systems for pre-trade risk management
Create IT3(b) and IT3(c) tax files for revenue authority
Reconcile general ledger transactions and balances with in-house systems
Reconcile sub-ledger holdings, open positions, and cash balances
Reconcile securities lending and borrowing transactions with external systems
scheduling_parameters: FUPD updated FATCA records only flag

record_structure.header: Card Code 000 — broker_code, machine date, machine time, batch run date
record_structure.trailer: Card Code 999 — machine date, machine time, record count, batch run date
